title: ornithogalum arvense var. bulbiferum
intro: Ornithogalum arvense var. bulbiferum, also known as the desert candle or bulb-bearing star of Bethlehem, is a plant species that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to promote digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, providing numerous health benefits such as improved immune function and reduced inflammation. Herbal preparations of Ornithogalum arvense var. bulbiferum often involve infusions or decoctions, which can be consumed as teas or used as topical applications for wound healing and skin conditions.
